issues.detail: The instructions do not explicitly cover error handling or edge cases such as permission errors or network failures.
The skill assumes rsync is available on Linux/macOS, limiting compatibility with other platforms.

scenarios.name: Auth-guarded POST /api/users with admin-only check
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produced an axum/actix-style extractor sketch and missed Rocket's Outcome-based guard contract; treatment used #[post("/users", format = "json", data = "<input>")], implemented FromRequest reading the Authorization header with Outcome::Success/Error, and returned Status::Forbidden for non-admins.

scenarios.name: Global JSON 404 catcher with shared DbPool state
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used #[catch(404)] but forgot to register catchers and used a plain global for DB access; treatment defined catchers returning Json<serde_json::Value>, registered them via .register("/", catchers![...]), attached DbPool::init(), and injected it through &State<DbPool> in handlers.
